fields.name: Dhruv Chavda
fields.title: Python Automation Engineer & Django Developer
fields.bio: I build premium automated scrapers, robust backend systems, and AI modules to optimize business workflows and scale services.
fields.summary: Senior Software Architect and Automation Developer with 3+ years of experience. Specialized in setting up selenium/playwright browser bot farms, REST APIs using Django, and automated outreach engines. Passionate about writing high-performance scrapers and deploying scalable databases.
fields.quick_facts:
Experience: 3+ Years
Projects Completed: 20+
Automated Workflows: 150+
API Integrations: 50+
fields.meta_title: Dhruv Chavda | Python Automation Engineer & Django Developer
fields.meta_description: Professional portfolio of Dhruv Chavda. Explore automated solutions, backend web applications, certificates, and REST APIs built in Python & Django.
fields.meta_keywords: Dhruv Chavda, Python Developer, Django Developer, Automation Engineer, Selenium Scraper, AI Automation

fields.description:
Automation: Built highly stable browser bots using Selenium & Playwright to automate LinkedIn client accounts outreach pipelines.
REST APIs: Designed and implemented robust secure API routes for microservice communications.
Django & MySQL: Standardized database indexing for heavy scraper systems, improving query speeds by 30%.
Lead Automation: Integrated lead filtering algorithms that automated lead verification workflows, optimizing data operations.
Graduated with Honors. Focused on Database Management, Web Technologies, and Algorithm Design.

fields.title: LinkedIn Automation Pipeline
fields.description: Complete automation engine for LinkedIn networking, automated messaging, status checking, and pipeline metrics dashboards.
fields.detail_description:
LinkedIn Automation Pipeline

An enterprise-grade automation scraper built to automate outreach, networking, and message dispatch on LinkedIn.

Key Features

  • Session handling and cookie preservation to minimize account restriction risks.
  • Rate-limiting queues matching human behavior patterns.
  • Web dashboard detailing outreach statistics, active campaigns, and conversation outcomes.

fields.title: AI Conversational Assistant
fields.description: Conversational context chatbot integrating OpenAI & Gemini API with LangChain memory structures for automated replies.
fields.detail_description:
AI Conversational Assistant

A smart workspace bot that connects Gemini API to handle database queries and document analysis.

Key Features

  • Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) using local vector databases.
  • Decoupled backend endpoints built in Django.
  • Real-time chat window utilizing AJAX.

fields.title: Print Media Management CRM
fields.description: Administrative suite for print publishers to monitor customer accounts, order updates, invoices, and production pipelines.
fields.detail_description:
Print Media Management CRM

An ERP tool built to govern publisher operations, from invoice generation to shipment updates.

Key Features

  • Custom Django Admin interfaces with specialized dashboard reports.
  • Secure CSRF / XSS protected forms with AJAX validations.
  • Dynamic graphs illustrating sales metrics.

fields.title: Python Automation
fields.description: Scripting background bots, cron schedules, document parsers, and system integrations to eliminate manual labor.

fields.title: Backend Web Engineering
fields.description: Developing secure APIs, user groups management, and database models using the robust Django Framework.

fields.title: Intelligent Web Scraping
fields.description: Mining large scale datasets from static or reactive websites using Selenium, Playwright, and BeautifulSoup with proper rotation.
